body:
## Rationale

**🟠 HIGH — active CTR gap entity + major arc hole**

**GSC signal:** Brann Dailor has a documented CTR gap: **23 impressions / pos 6.3 / 0 clicks** ("brann dailor drum kit" cluster). Per CEO learned-patterns.md, the Brann-Dailor-pattern is to ship content depth to convert impressions to clicks. Once More 'Round the Sun fills the single most glaring gap in the Brann cluster.

**Arc coherence:** Brann Dailor's Mastodon arc is now almost complete — this is the one hole:
- ✅ `remission-drum-setup` (2002)
- ✅ `blood-mountain-drum-setup` (2006)
- ✅ `crack-the-skye-drum-setup` (2009)
- ✅ `koloss-drum-setup` (2012)
- ✅ `hunter-drum-setup` (2011)
- ❌ `once-more-round-the-sun-drum-setup` (2014) — MISSING — **THIS ISSUE**
- ✅ `emperor-of-sand-drum-setup` (2017)
- ✅ `hushed-and-grim-drum-setup` (2021)

**Album facts:** Mastodon's 6th studio album. Debuted #6 on Billboard 200. Features "High Road" (most streamed Mastodon song). Distinct drum production: Brann used the recording to refine his signature half-time groove and layered vocal parts. Strong LLM hook: "What album comes between Mastodon's The Hunter and Emperor of Sand?"

## Implementation

**File:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`

**Slug:** `once-more-round-the-sun-drum-setup`

**Article data shape:**
```js
{
  slug: 'once-more-round-the-sun-drum-setup',
  title: 'What Drums Did Brann Dailor Use on Once More \'Round the Sun?',
  metaTitle: 'Brann Dailor Drum Setup on Once More \'Round the Sun (2014) | Mastodon',
  metaDescription: 'Explore the drum kit Brann Dailor played on Mastodon\'s Once More \'Round the Sun (2014) — the Billboard #6 album featuring High Road.',
  drummer: 'brann-dailor',
  band: 'Mastodon',
  album: "Once More 'Round the Sun",
  year: 2014,
  label: 'Reprise Records',
  relatedAlbums: ['koloss-drum-setup', 'emperor-of-sand-drum-setup', 'hunter-drum-setup'],
}
```

**Also create:** `public/llms/articles/once-more-round-the-sun-drum-setup.md`

## Estimated uplift

Serves the documented Brann Dailor CTR gap (23 impr, 0 clicks). Completes the Mastodon arc, increasing internal link depth on the most visited cluster. Expected to convert 1-3 organic clicks/week at current GSC position.

## Verify

1. Page renders at `/articles/once-more-round-the-sun-drum-setup`
2. LLM file returns 200 at `/llms/articles/once-more-round-the-sun-drum-setup.md`
3. `/articles/koloss-drum-setup` shows relatedAlbum link to this page
4. Page has ≥300 words, Person schema for Brann Dailor, FAQPage schema
5. Internal links to /drummer/brann-dailor and at least 2 other Mastodon articles

## Done

- [x] `once-more-round-the-sun-drum-setup` added to `ALBUM_ARTICLES`
- [x] LLM markdown file created
title: SEO: Mastodon 'Once More 'Round the Sun' drum setup article (Brann Dailor, 2014 — fills Koloss → Emperor of Sand arc gap, addresses Brann CTR gap)
